data.title: China Cycle 2026: Building a Global Platform to Advance Global Cooperation and Innovation
data.description: The upcoming China International Bicycle Fair 2026, known as China Cycle 2026, is scheduled to take place from May 5 to May 8, 2026 at the Shanghai New International Expo Centre (SNIEC). The event will capitalize on China's prominent role in the bicycle industry as a key global hub.

data.title: Hong Kong extends AI Sandbox to all financial sectors; GenA.I. Sandbox++ by 4 regulators offers free GPU computing until June 2026.
data.description: A new initiative called GenA.I. Sandbox++ has been launched by four financial regulators in Hong Kong. It encompasses the banking, securities, insurance, and Mandatory Provident Fund (MPF) sectors. One notable feature is the provision of free GPU computing access, which will be available until June 2026. This move aims to foster innovation and development in the financial industry.

data.title: Fibocom Launches 5G SoC Dongle Solution to Empower Global Connectivity with High Integration
data.description: In Barcelona on March 4, 2026, Fibocom introduced its latest innovation at MWC 2026 - the new 5G SoC Dongle solution series. This cutting-edge technology boasts an all-in-one SoC architecture, merging top-tier 5G communication capabilities, an advanced operating system, and adaptable eSIM/vSIM services. The series received significant attention at the event, showcasing a glimpse into the future of connectivity.

data.title: Oculis to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
data.description: In Zug, Switzerland on March 5, 2026, Oculis Holding AG (Nasdaq: OCS; XICE: OCS), a leading global biopharmaceutical company specializing in solutions for ophthalmic and neuro-ophthalmic conditions with high medical demand, declared that the Company’s executives will engage in various investor conferences during March.
Details of a share buyback transaction from February 27 to March 4, 2026.

data.title: Oculis Publishes 2025 Consolidated Financial Statements
data.description: ZUG, Switzerland – On March 5, 2026, the Company released audited consolidated financial statements for the fiscal year 2025, as well as the MD&A. They have been submitted to the SEC on form 20-F. The documents are now available for review post the press release issued by the Company on March 3.
